title: SMod
description: A mod that adds totally cursed broken or overpowered items blocks and tools to the game that will make or break the game.
body:
# Imagine This
you are wandering inside your minecraft world and thoght _"man this isint cursed enought"_
## INTRODUCING SMod
### This is a mod i have made just for fun that adds totally cursed and overpowered items biomes blocks and enteties to minecraft that shoudn't be in this game o are just wayyy to stupid.




Things (in latest development build)
1. Advancements
- SMod (root advancement)
- How did you make that? (obtain a liquid miner)
- Simmilar but diffrent (enter GHZ)
- Greedy Capital (enter the emerald biome)
- Hot Arrest (obtain a Lava block)
- liquid Madness (obtaing a water block)
- Why? Why did you do that? _hidden advancement_ (eat soggy bread)
- Wait isint this suppoesd to be poisonus (eat a big boy mushroom)
2. Items/Blocks
- Tumble Music Disc (Agile Accelerando)
- Warhammer (textures currently bugged)
- Ride 'a' tron
- Phone
- Rocket
- Dynamite
- Nuke
- TP Staff
- Village placer
- Palm wood
- Sonic Boots
- Sonic dirt
- Liquid miner
- Realistic dirt and grass
- Cube of dominance
-  Edible totem
- Cola
- Cash register
- Shelf
- Aichent Pot
- Un/Lucuky Wish Blocks 
- Fire Flower
- Lavter 
3. Enteties
- Jack Black
4. Structures
- Shop
- Wishing Well (non desert)
- Aichent structure

Made using:
